On 2026-03-12, a cache invalidation refactor (pricing-service v2.4.1, PR #1847) was deployed to production by Shaq and reviewed by Kobe. The change altered how TTL values are computed for category-specific cache entries, moving from config-driven TTL lookup to call-site TTL passing. A missing wiring for the seasonal category's 15-minute TTL override caused Redis to retain stale promotional prices. 8

Preserving the Learning names 4 concrete artifacts (ADR, Bird rulebook addition, Kobe review checklist item, staging fixture policy).
